title: Immersive Aircraft: Better Engines
description: Adds new engines to immersive aircraft, as well as other new upgrades
body:
# Immersive Aircraft: Better Engines
**This mod changes the way progress in immersive aircraft work, now boasting a sophisticated progression with lots of items, upgrades and planes!** **If you have ever wanted to go faster in immersive aircraft, this mod is for you!**
## Upgrade your planes and reach more than 400kmh/250mph!
![a plane in the air with its speed being 423kmh/263mph](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee83dae4816877a55dd8c7515b6d2f4a08f4ab08_0.webp)  
   
   ## Travel with all your friends using the COMMERCIAL HOPPER!    
   ![A commercial hopper, with a lot of players(10+) on its wings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/338e452e9d528879143bf5723a0de8b2657a1660_0.webp)     
   

## Beat everyone in terms of speed usign the SPORT BIPLANE!  
  ![Sport biplane, having the italian flag dyed on its propeller and having "race 4 life" written on it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8ca866fb1c489c5c42b088d7c3a867234703dd0.png) 

## Check out a few of the new engines and upgrades!
  ![Supercharger upgrade, increasing engine power, takeoff speed and fuel requirement.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c90762ef081968412a71f70065227044d8d66d7.png)    
  ![end engine upgrade, increasing engine power and fuel requirement majorly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77999bd07387cd80f4e539cc9d048766ad97cdc3.png)     
  ![turbo upgrade, increasing engine power while decreasing fuel usage.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/470945afe7d1c54d1233baef954dfa55bcaddcaf.png) 
   
Full list of new upgrades in 1.0.0:
- Semi Eco Engine
- Reinforced Engine
- Gold Plated Engine
- Diamond Powered Engine
- Jet Engine
- Turbocharger
- Twin turbocharger
- Quad turbocharger
- Supercharger
  
![New upgrades applied to a biplane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5d841bf7510e1ea2f21eec0cbc753451b67785b_0.webp)

There have also been **balancing** changes in 1.0.0!
- Eco engine nerfed with 25%->50% less engine power
- Nether engine nerfed with +350% fuel usage but buffed with +250% engine power
- Along with new recipes for the above 2 engines
